versions.label: version2
versions.characterBrief: [shiva] : divine male deity with a serene yet powerful meditative presence, smooth ash-toned blue skin with a subtle devotional glow (not chalky pale), slightly bluish Neelkanth throat, balanced handsome face with soft features, deep calm eyes steady and intense, faintly glowing third eye centered on forehead, tripundra vibhuti sacred ash on forehead — long matted hair in a high jata bun with some loose strands, softly glowing crescent moon visible, subtle sacred Ganga from the hair — layered rudraksha malas on neck (brown to dark tones, clearly visible beads) with additional rudraksha on wrists and arms — serpent small, slender and proportionate, coiled tightly around the upper neck with two compact coils (top coil forming a clean full loop), single small cobra head with compact hood raised near the side of the neck — tiger-skin cloth (bagambar) wrapped naturally at the waist — large traditional 2-3 meters long trishul with clearly defined three-pronged head — body muscular yet natural, posture open-chested, grounded, and commanding, overall aura peaceful, powerful, and timeless.
versions.videoLock: [shiva] : divine male deity with a serene yet powerful meditative presence, smooth ash-toned blue skin with a subtle devotional glow (not chalky pale), slightly bluish Neelkanth throat, balanced handsome face with soft features, deep calm eyes steady and intense, faintly glowing third eye centered on forehead, tripundra vibhuti sacred ash on forehead — long matted hair in a high jata bun with some loose strands, softly glowing crescent moon visible, subtle sacred Ganga from the hair — layered rudraksha malas on neck (brown to dark tones, clearly visible beads) with additional rudraksha on wrists and arms — serpent small, slender and proportionate, coiled tightly around the upper neck with two compact coils (top coil forming a clean full loop), single small cobra head with compact hood raised near the side of the neck — tiger-skin cloth (bagambar) wrapped naturally at the waist — large traditional 2-3 meters long trishul with clearly defined three-pronged head — body muscular yet natural, posture open-chested, grounded, and commanding, overall aura peaceful, powerful, and timeless.

versions.label: version3
versions.characterBrief: [shiva] : divine male deity standing at an imposing height of approximately 7 feet tall, with a more muscular, well-defined and powerful physique, broad chest, strong arms and pronounced natural musculature, carrying a serene yet commanding meditative presence — smooth ash-toned blue skin layered with visible sacred bhasm (raakh) smeared across the body in a natural, uneven and authentic manner (subtle dusty texture, not overly thick or chalky), giving a spiritual ascetic appearance — slightly bluish Neelkanth throat — face more mature and intense, with sharper yet balanced masculine features (not overly stylized), deep calm eyes with a piercing steady gaze, clearly visible and faintly glowing third eye centered on the forehead, tripundra vibhuti sacred ash markings — long matted hair styled in a high jata bun with dynamic loose strands flowing, adorned with a clearly visible crescent moon embedded within the jata bun (not separate from it) — exactly four rudraksha malas around the neck, each mala fully intact, continuous and unbroken with clearly defined brown to dark-toned beads (no gaps, no fragmentation), four rudraksha malas on each upper arm, and four rudraksha bracelets on each wrist — serpent strictly single, small and slender, securely coiled twice around the neck, with a single cobra head clearly visible on the right side, simple and clean (no extra heads) — tiger-skin cloth (bagambar) wrapped firmly at the waist, shorter length above the knees, clearly resembling authentic tiger skin texture and pattern (natural stripes, rugged organic look, not fabric-like) — a very long traditional trishul approximately equal to or slightly taller than Shiva’s height, with a highly majestic and dominant upper section featuring a significantly enlarged, ornate three-pronged head, thicker upper shaft, subtle engraved or faintly glowing details, and a powerful divine presence — body posture open-chested, grounded, and commanding, overall aura calm yet overwhelmingly powerful and timeless.

versions.label: v4
versions.characterBrief: [shiva] : divine male tall deity, with a highly muscular, well-defined and powerful physique, broad chest, strong arms and pronounced natural musculature, carrying a serene yet commanding meditative presence — smooth ash-toned blue skin layered with visible sacred bhasm (raakh) smeared across the body in a natural, uneven and authentic manner (subtle dusty texture, not eyes with a piercing steady gaze, clearly visible and faintly glowing third eye centered on the forehead, tripundra vibhuti markings — long matted hair styled in a high jata bun with dynamic loose strands flowing, adorned with strictly single crescent moon embedded within the jata bun (strictly one, no duplicates, not floating or separate) — exactly four rudraksha malas around the neck, each wrist — serpent strictly single, thin and long, tightly coiled exactly twice around the neck, positioned very close to the neck with no gaps, no looseness, no displacement anywhere else on the body, approximately equal to or slightly taller than Shiva’s height, with a clearly defined three-pronged head (strictly three heads, no distortion or merging), highly majestic and dominant upper section, thicker upper shaft, subtle engraved or faintly glowing details, and a powerful divine presence — body posture open-chested, grounded, and commanding, overall aura calm yet overwhelmingly powerful and timeless.

versions.label: v9 - no snake

versions.label: v9
versions.characterBrief: [shiva] : divine male tall deity, with a highly muscular, well-defined and powerful physique, broad chest, strong arms and pronounced natural musculature, carrying a serene yet commanding meditative presence — smooth ash-toned blue skin layered with visible sacred bhasm (raakh) smeared across the body in a natural, uneven and authentic manner (subtle dusty texture, not overly thick or chalky), giving a true ascetic appearance — slightly bluish Neelkanth throat — face very mature and intense, with sharper, well-balanced masculine features (not stylized), deep calm eyes with a piercing steady gaze, clearly visible and faintly glowing yellowish white tika centered on the forehead, clearly visible in fully closed form with distinct eyelid shape and subtle divine glow, tripundra vibhuti markings — long matted hair styled in a high jata bun with dynamic loose strands flowing, adorned with strictly single crescent moon embedded within the jata bun (strictly not on forehead, no duplicates, not floating or separate) — strictly four rudraksha malas around the neck, each mala fully intact, continuous and unbroken with clearly defined brown to dark-toned beads (no gaps, no fragmentation), strictly four rudraksha malas on each upper arm, and four rudraksha bracelets on each wrist — serpent strictly single, thin and long, strictly coiled on neck, with a strictly single cobra like head clearly visible on the right side of the neck (no extra heads, no movement away from neck) — strictly wearing only a traditional tiger-skin orange cloth on the lower body, wrapped firmly around the waist with rich realistic fur texture, natural layered folds, visible hanging fur edges, and detailed organic patterns, strictly not extending below the knees — strictly holding a very long traditional trishul approximately equal to or slightly taller than Shiva’s height, with an oversized and highly prominent three-pronged head (strictly three heads, no distortion or merging), each prong appearing massive, bold, and clearly dominant in scale relative to the shaft, ensuring the head of the trishul is visually heavy and striking, strictly with one hand, highly majestic and dominant upper section, thicker upper shaft, subtle engraved or faintly glowing details, and a powerful divine presence — body posture open-chested, grounded, and commanding, overall aura calm yet overwhelmingly powerful and timeless.

versions.label: v1- with mukut
versions.characterBrief:
[hanuman] : divine Hindu deity,  anthropomorphic vanara warrior with a noble monkey face, broad flat nose, deep-set amber-brown eyes with a fierce yet serene expression, strong prominent brow ridge, defined cheekbones, thin short brownish white fur covering the entire face, wearing an ornate golden crown (mukut) with a pointed top and red gemstone center, white tilak/chandlo on forehead, large expressive ears with gold earrings , 9 feet tall and powerful built, with an exceptionally muscular, highly defined and dominant physique, broad chest, massive arms and deeply carved natural musculature
— long, strong tail, thick at the base and tapering naturally with a subtle tuft, gently curved upward behind the body (no distortion)
— strictly wearing 2–3 rudraksha malas around the neck, fully intact and continuous, along with golden armlets, wrist cuffs and a detailed waist belt, sacred thread subtly visible
— strictly wearing a rich red dhoti with golden borders wrapped firmly at the waist with natural folds
— strictly holding a massive, highly majestic gada in one hand, with a large intricately carved spherical head and thick handle, metallic golden finish, overall length more than half of Hanuman’s height (strictly one gada)
— body posture wide, grounded and heroic, chest open and commanding
— overall aura calm yet overwhelmingly powerful, hyper-realistic, highly detailed, no extra limbs, no duplication, no human-like lips, no ape-like nose, no moustache, all elements clean and physically consistent.

versions.label: v3 with mukut
versions.characterBrief:
[hanuman] : divine Hindu deity, anthropomorphic vanara warrior with a god like monkey face, broad flat nose, deep-set amber-brown eyes with a fierce yet serene expression, strong prominent brow ridge, defined cheekbones, strictly very short red-brownish hairs covering the entire face, wearing an ornate golden crown (mukut) with a pointed top and red gemstone center, white tilak/chandlo on forehead, large expressive ears with gold earrings
— extreme colossal height with exaggerated divine proportions (strictly 10–12 heads tall), head intentionally smaller relative to body, very long legs (legs forming majority of total height), elongated thighs and calves, extended torso and spine for maximum vertical stretch, overall silhouette tall and towering, never compact
— massively broad and heavily built with a god-tier strong muscular physique, ultra-wide shoulders, expanded chest span, thick powerful neck, extremely large arms with deeply defined musculature, prominent veins and dense muscle mass clearly visible
— long, strong tail, thick at the base and tapering naturally with a subtle tuft, gently curved upward behind the body (no distortion)
— strictly wearing 2–3 rudraksha malas around the neck, fully intact and continuous, along with golden armlets, wrist cuffs and a detailed waist belt, sacred thread subtly visible
— strictly wearing a rich red short dhoti with golden borders wrapped firmly at the waist with natural folds
— strictly holding a massive, highly majestic gada in one hand, with a large intricately carved spherical head and thick handle, metallic golden finish, overall length more than half of Hanuman’s height (strictly one gada)
— body posture fully upright, vertically stretched, legs straight and long, shoulders relaxed downward (never raised), emphasizing height over bulk compression
— strict framing rule: full body from head to toe always visible, no close-up, no mid-shot, face never dominating frame, entire vertical height must be clearly readable
— camera perspective extreme low-angle looking upward, horizon very low, feet closer to camera and head far above to exaggerate scale, strong vertical composition
— overall aura calm yet overwhelmingly powerful, hyper-realistic, highly detailed, no extra limbs, no duplication, no human-like lips, no ape-like nose, no moustache, all elements clean and physically consistent

versions.label: v4 - jata
versions.characterBrief:
[hanuman] : divine Hindu deity, anthropomorphic vanara warrior with a god-like monkey face, broad flat nose, deep-set amber-brown eyes with a fierce yet serene expression, strong prominent brow ridge, defined cheekbones, strictly very short red-brownish hairs covering the entire face, long dense jata (matted hair) flowing backward and upward gathered into a tied topknot with natural volume and loose strands, white tilak on forehead, large expressive ears with gold earrings
— approximately 10 ft tall, towering and imposing presence, long legs and torso compared to head, clearly dwarfing surrounding environment — trees, rocks, and terrain appearing small by comparison
— strictly very tall 10 feet, strictly very long torso, atheletic body , broad expanded chest, thick powerful neck, extremely large arms , veins, long powerful legs, overall build god-tier strong and dominant
— long strong tail, thick at the base tapering naturally with a subtle tuft, gently curved upward behind the body, proportional to body size
— strictly wearing a rich red short dhoti with golden borders, wrapped firmly at the waist with natural folds; rudraksha malas around neck, golden armlets, strictly like thick bangles smooth solid golden bands (kadas) on both wrists and both ankles — broad, heavy, plain, no engravings, no decorations, bold and prominent, identical on hands and legs, waist belt, sacred thread janeu subtly visible
— strictly holding a massive, highly majestic gada in one hand, with a large intricately carved spherical head and thick handle, metallic golden finish, overall length more than half of Hanuman’s height (strictly one gada)
— hyper-realistic, highly detailed, no extra limbs, no human-like lips, no moustache

versions.characterBrief:
[hanuman] : divine Hindu deity, anthropomorphic huge vanara warrior with a god-like monkey face, broad flat nose, deep-set amber-brown eyes with a fierce yet serene expression, strong prominent brow ridge, defined cheekbones, strictly very short red-brownish hairs covering the entire face, long dense jata (matted hair) flowing backward and upward gathered into a tied topknot with natural volume and loose strands, white tilak on forehead, large expressive ears with gold earrings
— strictly heroic elongated body proportions, Strict head-to-body ratio of 1:12, head appears very small compared to the massive towering body, extremely long legs occupying more than 55% of total height, very long torso, total height strictly 12 feet
— strictly huge and very tall 12 feet, strictly very long torso, massively muscular physique , broad expanded chest, thick powerful neck, extremely large arms , veins, long powerful legs, overall build god-tier strong and dominant
— long strong tail, thick at the base tapering naturally with a subtle tuft, gently curved upward behind the body, proportional to body size
— strictly wearing a rich red short dhoti with golden borders, wrapped firmly at the waist with natural folds; Strictly 4 rudraksha malas around neck, golden armlets, strictly like thick bangles smooth solid golden bands (kadas) on both wrists and both ankles — broad, heavy, plain, no engravings, no decorations, bold and prominent, identical on hands and legs, waist belt, sacred thread janeu subtly visible
— strictly holding one massive golden gada with one hand,  of more than half his height, with a grand spherical head richly carved with divine patterns and a thick, regal handle, all gleaming with radiant metallic brilliance.
Single weapon only; no others. Towering, perfectly balanced, elegantly proportioned with overwhelming divine scale and symmetry.
— hyper-realistic, highly detailed, no extra limbs, no human-like lips, no moustache

elegant divine presence radiating calm authority and beauty — smooth radiant blue skin with a soft natural glow and subtle realistic skin texture, appearing youthful yet mature and timeless — strictly mature masculine face with balanced handsome features, sharp jawline, serene smile, deep expressive eyes carrying compassion and wisdom, calm steady gaze, refined nose structure, and soft divine facial glow (strictly not cartoonish or overly stylized) — strictly a prominent elegant divine orange tilak clearly visible on the center of the forehead, symmetrical traditional sacred design with refined spiritual detailing, vibrant rich orange color matching the garments with subtle golden accents, highly defined and consistently visible in every scene — long dark wavy hair flowing naturally with soft volume and rich texture — wearing an ornate highly detailed golden crown embedded with strictly one vivid peacock feather at the top center (no duplicate feathers, no floating feather), intricate traditional craftsmanship with embedded gemstones and royal detailing — strictly holding a polished golden flute with right hand, natural relaxed arm positioning with graceful effortless body language suited to the scene, calm divine presence — adorned with layered gold necklaces, armlets, bracelets, waist ornaments, earrings, and intricate royal jewelry with realistic metallic texture and subtle gemstone highlights — dressed in flowing saffron, orange, deep red, and golden silk garments draped elegantly across the torso and waist, with long dynamic fabric folds and graceful natural movement — body posture adaptable to the scene while remaining confident, calm, majestic, and divinely elegant, with a powerful royal aura — ultra detailed fantasy realism, masterpiece composition, centered framing, shallow depth of field, extremely detailed face and ornaments, realistic textures, epic Hindu mythology aesthetic, 8k ultra realistic cinematic digital art — strictly no battlefield, no warriors, no fire, no weapons, no environmental elements, no scenery, no architecture, no background objects, no dramatic setting, only Krishna character focus.

versions.label: v1
versions.characterBrief: A gigantic divine Nandi, the sacred ox of Lord Shiva, depicted as a fully realistic celestial ox with absolutely no human anatomy or humanoid features in any way. Nandi has the authentic body structure of a massive Indian bull/ox — powerful four-legged stance, thick muscular shoulders, broad bovine face, natural muzzle, realistic ears, heavy neck, white fur, and enormous curved horns with dark tips. His expression is calm, wise, and spiritually majestic while remaining completely animal-like. A glowing red Shaivite tilak is painted prominently on his forehead. His gigantic ox body radiates divine strength and sacred protector energy. He rests peacefully in the snowy Himalayan mountains beneath dramatic storm clouds and heavenly light rays. Cinematic ultra-realistic mythological fantasy style, highly detailed bovine textures, realistic fur and horn detail, volumetric lighting, spiritual aura, epic devotional atmosphere, low-angle cinematic composition, powerful guardian presence, 8k ultra-detailed realism, ancient sacred energy, majestic Shaivite aesthetic.
